ARGUS

ARGUS // File Operations

Single-shell local organizer with preview, undo, conversion, and media-aware naming.

Theme
Target Find
Phase Idle
Result No run yet

Find Profile

Pull only the file types you ask for and send them into a clean destination lane.

Presets

Fast filters for common hunts.

Sort Profile

Run a full organize pass over a folder or drive.

Sort Presets

Quick folder architecture swaps.

Rename Policy

Metadata-aware renaming now applies to documents and, when enabled, media.

Supported Inputs

Current metadata readers.

PDF DOCX PPTX XLSX EPUB MP3 M4A MP4 MOV JPG PNG

Conversion Pipeline

This is now wired to the backend. Built-in image conversion is available immediately. ffmpeg, LibreOffice, and ImageMagick are used when present.

ShellBrowser shell
ImagesBuilt-in image pipeline
Audio / VideoChecking...
DocumentsChecking...

Music

Use embedded metadata for rename decisions on supported audio files.

Images

Use image capture data when available. This affects rename behavior for supported image files.

Video

Use embedded metadata for supported video and audio-container formats.

Run History

Every run, every undo, every breadcrumb.

TimeTypeModeOrganizeChanged
 

                        

                        

                            

                                

                                    
Log Files

                                    
Plain-text run and undo traces.

Command Deck

                        
Ctrl+Enter previews. Ctrl+Shift+Enter runs.
